title: BuddyCards 32x32 pack
description:
32x32 resolution Resource pack focused on the BuddyCards Mod! 


*This pack does not included any vanilla blocks, only the ones added by the Buddycards and Buddycards Expansions mod!
body:
32x32 resolution Resource pack focused on the BuddyCards Mod! 

![added textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06a7d4c5ce3776b60e9905058b8b0c89cdee61be.png)

*This pack does not included any vanilla blocks, only the ones added by the Buddycards and Buddycards Expansions mod!

 

This resource pack offers you a higher resolution view of the original cards included by these mods, giving you a better immersion when playing modded Minecraft with 32x32 vanilla resource packs.
 

Any problems please tell me by the comments, i'll make my best to keep it working well. 

 

Download the the Mods!

- BuddyCards
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/buddycards


- BuddyCards Expansions

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/buddycards-expansions
